untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-market IV spread comparison (IV_market_1 - IV_market_2), correlation analysis between two markets, and relative option valuation mispricing detection. These cross-market derivatives and IV differential metrics are not available in the single-instrument indicator set. The signal is inherently multi-leg/multi-market and cannot be expressed using only single-instrument technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using hvol_20 (historical volatility) to represent volatility regime changes and sma_20 for trend confirmation, but this does NOT capture the core logic of relative IV spread mean reversion or market correlation requirements. The true signal requires a volatility surface comparison engine outside the scope of standard single-instrument backtesting indicators.
